quotes.text: Choose your idols wisely — worship the doctor who saves you, not the actor who entertains you.
A celebrity's on-screen persona is a character. Their off-screen choices are who they really are.
Silence on injustice is a statement too.
India has a celebrity-worship problem. Real heroes are chosen by their actions, not their fame.
Would you worship a chef who cooks for you, or a doctor who saves you? Then why not choose role models by the same measure?
